task: Place the red and white vegetable to the bottom right corner of the table.
raw:
**SCENE ANALYSIS -** A red and white vegetable (likely a tomato) is on a wooden table. A blue plate is on the table, and a metal bowl is on the blue plate. The vegetable is a rigid object with a smooth surface. STRATEGY - First, reach and grasp the vegetable. Then, transport it to the bottom right corner of the table. Failure modes include dropping the vegetable during transport or misplacing it. AFFORDANCE REASONING - Step 1 reach the vegetable at its body for a stable grasp; Step 2 grasp the vegetable for secure hold; Step 3 transport the vegetable to the bottom right corner; Step 4 place the vegetable there.

Goal: on(red_and_white_vegetable, table); position(red_and_white_vegetable, bottom_right_corner)
Scene: red_and_white_vegetable, table, blue_plate, metal_bowl
Step 1: reach(red_and_white_vegetable)
  affordance_region: the body of the red and white vegetable
  contact: gripper_state(open) [progress]
  spatial: distance(gripper, red_and_white_vegetable, <, 0.03) [completion]
  direction: approach_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: distance(gripper, red_and_white_vegetable) < 0.03
Step 2: grasp(red_and_white_vegetable)
  affordance_region: the body of the red and white vegetable
  contact: holding(red_and_white_vegetable) [completion]
  direction: grasp_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: holding(red_and_white_vegetable)
Step 3: transport(red_and_white_vegetable -> table)
  affordance_region: the bottom right corner of the table
  spatial: above(red_and_white_vegetable, table, 0.05) [completion]
  safety: no_drop(red_and_white_vegetable)
  done_when: above(red_and_white_vegetable, table, 0.05)
Step 4: place(red_and_white_vegetable -> table)
  affordance_region: the bottom right corner of the table
  contact: surface_contact(red_and_white_vegetable, table) [completion]; released(red_and_white_vegetable) [completion]
  pose: position(red_and_white_vegetable, bottom_right_corner) [completion]
  done_when: surface_contact(red_and_white_vegetable, table) AND released(red_and_white_vegetable)
<END_OF_PLAN>

steps.affordance_region: the body of the red and white vegetable
the body of the red and white vegetable
the bottom right corner of the table
the bottom right corner of the table
